text: Stepping into this luminous, modern space, I am struck by the overlay of technology and human curiosity. The glowing blue lights and the bold R+D mural suggest a place of inquiry and invention. I feel a quiet excitement, mingled with the uncertainty that arises when confronted by innovation’s many possibilities. The sterile aesthetic and glass barriers remind me that knowledge here is both accessible and protected—an invitation to learn, but also a reminder of boundaries.
